ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example

ruleScores.issue: Some enforcement tools are vaguely named: 'API Middleware', 'Bundle Analyzer', 'Query Analyzer', 'ESLint Plugin' without specific tool names or configuration details

ruleScores.ruleName: Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All required sections present with proper structure
All 8 rules have proper severity and enforcement labels
Rule count of 8 is within the 5-9 bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good examples
Comprehensive boundary definitions with Architecture, Security, and Observability agents
Proper YAML metadata with version 1.0 and current date
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules
Clear categorization into Hard Boundaries, Structural Heuristics, and Governance
gaps: Enforcement tools need more specificity: 'Bundle Analyzer' should specify webpack-bundle-analyzer or similar, 'ESLint Plugin' should name the specific plugin
Some tools like 'API Middleware' and 'Query Analyzer' are generic - should specify actual implementation tools
